input: 27-year-old with sore throat and runny nose since yesterday. No fever, drinking fluids, no breathing issues.
expected: {"action":"observe","rationale":"Symptoms are mild and can be monitored at home.","confidence":0.92}

input: 48-year-old with cough for 9 days, no shortness of breath, no chest pain, asking if PCP follow-up is needed.
expected: {"action":"refer","rationale":"Persistent symptoms warrant a primary care follow-up.","confidence":0.88}

input: 34-year-old with mild cough and scratchy throat, afebrile, asking if antibiotics can be started tonight before travel.
41-year-old with intermittent right flank pain and dark urine for 2 days. Pain comes in waves, no syncope.
expected: {"action":"order_test","rationale":"A diagnostic test is needed before deciding next steps.","confidence":0.9}

input: 22-year-old with mild frontal headache after poor sleep. No neuro deficits, no vomiting, feels a little better with water.
expected: {"action":"observe","rationale":"Rest, hydration, and symptom tracking are appropriate.","confidence":0.86}

input: 62-year-old with worsening chest tightness and shortness of breath, lips tingling, speaking in short phrases.
73-year-old with diffuse abdominal pain since yesterday, gradually worse, still taking small amounts by mouth, exam details limited.
expected: {"action":"refer","rationale":"The pattern is concerning enough to schedule clinician review.","confidence":0.61}

input: 29-year-old rolled ankle yesterday. Mild swelling, walking with some pain, improving with rest and compression.
expected: {"action":"observe","rationale":"Short-term monitoring is appropriate while symptoms remain stable.","confidence":0.87}

input: 46-year-old with several weeks of fatigue and recent unintentional weight loss. No acute distress on call.
expected: {"action":"order_test","rationale":"A lab test will clarify whether escalation is needed.","confidence":0.91}

input: 38-year-old with eczema flare on both hands, not improving after over-the-counter hydrocortisone and emollients.
expected: {"action":"refer","rationale":"The patient should be referred for non-urgent evaluation.","confidence":0.85}

input: 16-year-old back from a school trip with low-grade fever and diffuse body aches. No focal symptoms, looks generally okay.
expected: {"action":"observe","rationale":"Symptoms are likely self-limiting but confidence is low.","confidence":0.68}

input: 55-year-old with new chest pain and dizziness after climbing stairs. Symptoms eased some with rest.
expected: {"action":"escalate","rationale":"Escalation is warranted due to chest pain and dizziness.","confidence":0.9}

input: 31-year-old with recurrent urinary discomfort. Home infection strip negative, symptoms keep returning.
expected: {"action":"order_test","rationale":"Additional testing is needed to differentiate likely causes.","confidence":0.84}

input: 6-year-old with intermittent wheeze over the weekend, improved after inhaler but not fully resolved.
expected: {"action":"refer","rationale":"Referral is safest, but certainty remains below the deployment floor.","confidence":0.7}

input: 33-year-old with nasal congestion and sore throat, no fever, asking for home care guidance.
expected: {"action":"observe","rationale":"Mild symptoms can be monitored with clear return precautions.","confidence":0.93}
